pi_items.source: Task description and verifier.py programmatic logic
Task description and verifier.py XML parsing logic

privileged_info_summary: Verified that the target KML path 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\survey_path.kml' and track name 'Official Survey Path' are explicitly enforced by the verifier script. The task operates on real-world GPX data (fells_loop.gpx, representing the Middlesex Fells Reservation). A severe structural bug exists: the task is missing its required pre_task (setup_task.ps1) and post_task (export_result.ps1) hooks. Consequently, the verifier will always return a score of 0 because it strictly requires 'C:\tmp\task_result.json' which is never generated. Moreover, the default imported file fells_loop.gpx contains only a route, no track points, requiring the user to either manually import a different track (dole_langres_track.gpx from the Desktop) or convert the existing route to a track.
